title: Ari's Buckets
description: Do buckets still feel like programmer art? This is the pack for you!
body:
This pack retextures buckets to have a softer and more modern look.

**Special thanks to:**
The Wilder Wild team for making the **Wilder Wild** mod.

# **Compatibility:**
As of 1.0, this pack is compatible with Wilder Wild. More mod compatibility will come in the future.
